    29→- `/login` — Smart: uses Clerk SignIn when VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY set, Demo Mode otherwise
    30→- `lib/auth-context.tsx` — AuthContext + DemoAuthProvider + useAuth hook
    31→- `lib/clerk-auth-inner.tsx` — ClerkAuthProviderInner (uses useUser/useClerk/useAuth from @clerk/clerk-react)
    32→- `main.tsx` — wraps with ClerkProvider+ClerkAuthProviderInner or DemoAuthProvider based on key existence
    33→
    34→## Layout
    35→- Navbar: logo + desktop nav links + notification bell badge + user dropdown
    36→- BottomNav: mobile-only, role-aware (different tabs per role)
    37→
    38→# Backend (Hono.js + Node.js local, port 8787)
    39→
    40→## Routes
    41→- `GET /api/pricing/calculate` — حساب سعر التوصيل بـ Haversine + zone detection
    42→- `GET /api/pricing/zones` — كل مناطق التسعير من DB
    43→- `POST /api/orders` — create order (CLIENT only, validated)
    44→- `GET /api/orders/pending` — pending orders (COURIER/ADMIN only, KV cached 3s)
    45→- `POST /api/orders/:id/accept` — accept order (KV lock + DB SELECT FOR UPDATE NOWAIT)
    46→- `GET /api/orders/my` — user's own orders
    47→- `PATCH /api/orders/:id/status` — update status (courier ownership checked)
    48→- `POST /api/couriers/register` — register courier
    49→- `GET /api/couriers/profile` — courier profile
    50→- `PATCH /api/couriers/online-status` — toggle availability
    51→- `POST /api/couriers/rate/:orderId` — rate a courier
    52→- `GET/POST /api/admin/pricing` — pricing management (ADMIN only)
    53→- `GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/ads` — ads management (ADMIN only)
    54→- `GET /api/admin/couriers` — list couriers
    55→- `PATCH /api/admin/couriers/:id/approve` — approve/reject
    56→- `GET /api/admin/orders` — all orders with pagination
    57→- `POST /api/upload/id` — upload ID card images (R2)
    58→- `GET /api/users/me` — current user profile (role from Supabase)
    59→- `PATCH /api/users/me` — update name/phone
    60→- `POST /api/webhooks/clerk` — Clerk webhook (user.created/updated/deleted → Supabase)
    61→
    62→## Clerk Webhook
    63→- No svix package (peer dep conflict) — implemented manual HMAC-SHA256 verification using Node.js `crypto`
    64→- Spec: svix-id + svix-timestamp + svix-signature headers; signed content = `id.timestamp.body`
    65→- Secret format: `whsec_<base64>` (strip prefix before HMAC)
    66→- Soft deletes users (sets deleted_at) instead of hard delete
    67→
    68→## Supabase Setup (CRITICAL LESSONS)
    69→- **Zone names must match DB**: detectZone() returns Arabic ('القاهرة','الجيزة','default') — must match admin_pricing.zone column
    70→- **Node.js 20 WebSocket fix**: backend/src/lib/supabase.ts uses `import ws from 'ws'` with `realtime: { transport: ws }` in createClient
    71→- **All routes use getSupabaseClient()**: never call createClient() directly in routes — import from `lib/supabase.ts` singleton
    72→- **Grants required**: must run `GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO service_role, anon, authenticated` + `GRANT ALL ON ALL TABLES` to service_role, SELECT to anon
    73→- **VITE_ prefix**: frontend env vars must be VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY and VITE_SUPABASE_URL — set via setEnvVars() not secrets
    74→- **Anon key validation**: frontend checks `anonKey.startsWith('eyJ')` before calling Supabase, falls back to demo data otherwise
    75→- **users table extra columns**: name, avatar_url, deleted_at must be added via sql/clerk-webhook-migration.sql
    76→
    77→## Database (Supabase PostgreSQL)
    78→- Project ref: klvceioawopljarpujnp
    79→- RLS on all 9 tables (users, couriers, customers, addresses, orders, order_items, admin_pricing, ad_offers, courier_ratings)
    80→- `accept_order()` function with SELECT FOR UPDATE NOWAIT (atomic, service_role only)
    81→- Trigger: `update_courier_avg_rating` auto-updates courier.rating
    82→- Seeded: 6 ad_offers + admin_pricing zones (default/القاهرة/الجيزة)
    83→
    84→## Onboarding Flow
    85→- New Clerk users arrive with `onboarded = false` in Supabase (set by webhook)
    86→- `clerk-auth-inner.tsx` exposes `needsOnboarding` in AuthContext
    87→- `OnboardingGuard` in `App.tsx` intercepts all routes and redirects to `/onboarding` if needed
    88→- `/onboarding` page: full-screen card picker (عميل / مندوب) → calls `POST /api/users/onboard`
    89→- After onboard: `onboarded = true`, role updated, redirect to correct dashboard
    90→- Demo users always have `onboarded: true` — guard is skipped for them
    91→- Onboarding outside Layout (no navbar/footer) — rendered directly in Routes above <Route element={<Layout/>}>
    92→
    93→## Key decisions
    94→**Why getSupabaseClient singleton:** prevents multiple RealtimeClient initializations per request
    95→**Why ws package:** Node.js 20 lacks native WebSocket
    96→**Why VITE_ env vars not secrets:** Vite build system only exposes VITE_-prefixed vars to frontend
    97→**Why fallback to demo data:** anon key validity check prevents crashes when key is misconfigured
    98→**Why manual HMAC for webhooks:** svix npm package has peer dep conflicts in this monorepo; Node crypto works identically
    99→**Why ClerkAuthProviderInner in separate file:** Vite ESM doesn't allow require(); Clerk hooks must be statically imported in a component only rendered inside ClerkProvider — separate file keeps DemoAuthProvider isolated
   100→**Why useAuth() for Clerk token:** In @clerk/clerk-react v5, getToken() is on the session via useAuth(), not on the UserResource object from useUser()
   101→

// =============================================================
// مندوبك - Prisma Schema
// =============================================================

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider  = "postgresql"
  url       = env("DATABASE_URL")
  directUrl = env("DIRECT_URL")
}

// =====================
// Users (Clerk-synced)
// =====================
model User {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  clerkId     String   @unique @map("clerk_id")
  email       String?  @unique
  phone       String?  @unique
  role        UserRole @default(CLIENT)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  courier     Courier?
  customer    Customer?
  orders      Order[]  @relation("ClientOrders")

  @@map("users")
}

enum UserRole {
  CLIENT
  COURIER
  ADMIN
}

// =====================
// Couriers (المناديب)
// =====================
model Courier {
  id              String        @id @default(cuid())
  userId          String        @unique @map("user_id")
  name            String
  phone           String        @unique
  address         String
  idFrontImageUrl String        @map("id_front_image_url")
  idBackImageUrl  String        @map("id_back_image_url")
  status          CourierStatus @default(PENDING_REVIEW)
  rating          Float         @default(0.0)
  totalDeliveries Int           @default(0) @map("total_deliveries")
  isOnline        Boolean       @default(false) @map("is_online")
  createdAt       DateTime      @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime      @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  user            User          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  orders          Order[]       @relation("CourierOrders")
  ratings         CourierRating[]

  @@map("couriers")
}

enum CourierStatus {
  PENDING_REVIEW
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
  SUSPENDED
}

// =====================
// Customers (العملاء)
// =====================
model Customer {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String   @unique @map("user_id")
  name      String
  phone     String   @unique
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  addresses Address[]
  orders    Order[]

  @@map("customers")
}

// =====================
// Addresses (العناوين)
// =====================
model Address {
  id         String   @id @default(cuid())
  customerId String   @map("customer_id")
  label      String
  street     String
  city       String
  district   String?
  latitude   Float
  longitude  Float
  isDefault  Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_default")
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  customer   Customer @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  ordersFrom Order[]  @relation("PickupAddress")
  ordersTo   Order[]  @relation("DeliveryAddress")

  @@map("addresses")
}

// =====================
// Orders (الأوردرات)
// =====================
model Order {
  id              String      @id @default(cuid())
  orderNumber     String      @unique @map("order_number")
  clientId        String      @map("client_id")
  courierId       String?     @map("courier_id")
  customerId      String?     @map("customer_id")
  type            OrderType
  status          OrderStatus @default(PENDING)
  pickupAddressId String?     @map("pickup_address_id")
  deliveryAddressId String?   @map("delivery_address_id")
  pickupDetails   String?     @map("pickup_details")
  deliveryDetails String?     @map("delivery_details")
  pickupLat       Float?      @map("pickup_lat")
  pickupLng       Float?      @map("pickup_lng")
  deliveryLat     Float?      @map("delivery_lat")
  deliveryLng     Float?      @map("delivery_lng")
  distanceKm      Float?      @map("distance_km")
  deliveryFee     Float       @map("delivery_fee")
  notes           String?
  acceptedAt      DateTime?   @map("accepted_at")
  completedAt     DateTime?   @map("completed_at")
  cancelledAt     DateTime?   @map("cancelled_at")
  createdAt       DateTime    @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime    @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  client          User        @relation("ClientOrders", fields: [clientId], references: [id])
  courier         Courier?    @relation("CourierOrders", fields: [courierId], references: [id])
  customer        Customer?   @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])
  pickupAddress   Address?    @relation("PickupAddress", fields: [pickupAddressId], references: [id])
  deliveryAddress Address?    @relation("DeliveryAddress", fields: [deliveryAddressId], references: [id])
  items           OrderItem[]
  adOffer         AdOffer?    @relation(fields: [adOfferId], references: [id])
  adOfferId       String?     @map("ad_offer_id")

  @@map("orders")
}

enum OrderType {
  SHOPPING     // مشتريات
  DELIVERY     // توصيل من A لـ B
}

enum OrderStatus {
  PENDING      // منتظر مندوب
  ACCEPTED     // اتحجز من مندوب
  PICKED_UP    // المندوب اخده
  DELIVERED    // وصل
  CANCELLED    // اتلغى
}

// =====================
// Order Items (منتجات الأوردر)
// =====================
model OrderItem {
  id          String  @id @default(cuid())
  orderId     String  @map("order_id")
  name        String
  description String?
  quantity    Int     @default(1)
  price       Float?
  shopName    String? @map("shop_name")
  shopAddress String? @map("shop_address")

}

// =====================
// Admin Pricing (التسعير)
// =====================
model AdminPricing {
  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
  zone           String   @unique
  pricePerKm     Float    @map("price_per_km")
  minimumFee     Float    @map("minimum_fee")
  maximumFee     Float?   @map("maximum_fee")
  isActive       Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  @@map("admin_pricing")
}

// =====================
// Ads & Offers (العروض)
// =====================
model AdOffer {
  id           String    @id @default(cuid())
  title        String
  description  String?
  imageUrl     String    @map("image_url")
  shopName     String    @map("shop_name")
  shopAddress  String    @map("shop_address")
  shopLat      Float     @map("shop_lat")
  shopLng      Float     @map("shop_lng")
  productName  String    @map("product_name")
  productPrice Float?    @map("product_price")
  isActive     Boolean   @default(true) @map("is_active")
  clickCount   Int       @default(0) @map("click_count")
  startDate    DateTime  @map("start_date")
  endDate      DateTime  @map("end_date")
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  orders       Order[]

  @@map("ad_offers")
}

// =====================
// Courier Ratings (التقييمات)
// =====================
model CourierRating {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  courierId String   @map("courier_id")
  orderId   String   @unique @map("order_id")
  rating    Int
  comment   String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  courier   Courier  @relation(fields: [courierId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("courier_ratings")
}

     1→// =============================================================
     2→// Pricing Calculator - حساب سعر التوصيل بـ Haversine Formula
     3→// =============================================================
     4→
     5→export type Coordinates = {
     6→  lat: number
     7→  lng: number
     8→}
     9→
    10→export type PricingZone = {
    11→  zone: string
    12→  price_per_km: number
    13→  minimum_fee: number
    14→  maximum_fee?: number | null
    15→}
    16→
    17→export type DeliveryPriceResult = {
    18→  distanceKm: number
    19→  zone: string
    20→  pricePerKm: number
    21→  minimumFee: number
    22→  calculatedFee: number
    23→  finalFee: number
    24→  breakdown: string
    25→}
    26→
    27→/**
    28→ * Haversine Formula - يحسب المسافة بين نقطتين على كرة الأرض
    29→ * النتيجة بالكيلومتر
    30→ */
    31→export function calculateDistance(from: Coordinates, to: Coordinates): number {
    32→  const R = 6371  // نصف قطر الأرض بالكيلومتر
    33→  
    34→  const dLat = toRadians(to.lat - from.lat)
    35→  const dLng = toRadians(to.lng - from.lng)
    36→  
    37→  const a = 
    38→    Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +
    39→    Math.cos(toRadians(from.lat)) * Math.cos(toRadians(to.lat)) *
    40→    Math.sin(dLng / 2) * Math.sin(dLng / 2)
    41→  
    42→  const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a))
    43→  const distance = R * c
    44→  
    45→  return Math.round(distance * 100) / 100  // تقريب لـ 2 decimals
    46→}
    47→
    48→function toRadians(degrees: number): number {
    49→  return degrees * (Math.PI / 180)
    50→}
    51→
    52→/**
    53→ * يحسب سعر التوصيل بناءً على المسافة ومنطقة التسعير
    54→ */
    55→export function calculateDeliveryFee(
    56→  distanceKm: number,
    57→  pricingZone: PricingZone
    58→): DeliveryPriceResult {
    59→  const calculatedFee = distanceKm * pricingZone.price_per_km
    60→  
    61→  let finalFee = Math.max(calculatedFee, pricingZone.minimum_fee)
    62→  
    63→  if (pricingZone.maximum_fee) {
    64→    finalFee = Math.min(finalFee, pricingZone.maximum_fee)
    65→  }
    66→  
    67→  finalFee = Math.ceil(finalFee)  // تقريب للأعلى لصالح المندوب
    68→  
    69→  return {
    70→    distanceKm,
    71→    zone: pricingZone.zone,
    72→    pricePerKm: pricingZone.price_per_km,
    73→    minimumFee: pricingZone.minimum_fee,
    74→    calculatedFee: Math.round(calculatedFee * 100) / 100,
    75→    finalFee,
    76→    breakdown: `${distanceKm} كم × ${pricingZone.price_per_km} جنيه = ${calculatedFee.toFixed(2)} جنيه (الحد الأدنى: ${pricingZone.minimum_fee} جنيه)`
    77→  }
    78→}
    79→
    80→/**
    81→ * يحدد المنطقة بناءً على الـ coordinates (تقدر تعدل الـ zones حسب مدينتك)
    82→ */
    83→export function detectZone(coords: Coordinates): string {
    84→  // الجيزة (أحدق نطاق أضيق - تتحقق قبل القاهرة)
    85→  if (coords.lat >= 29.9 && coords.lat <= 30.1 && 
    86→      coords.lng >= 30.8 && coords.lng <= 31.1) {
    87→    return 'الجيزة'
    88→  }
    89→  // القاهرة الكبرى
    90→  if (coords.lat >= 29.7 && coords.lat <= 30.3 && 
    91→      coords.lng >= 31.0 && coords.lng <= 31.6) {
    92→    return 'القاهرة'
    93→  }
    94→  // افتراضي
    95→  return 'default'
    96→}

---
name: Mandoubak project state
description: Complete delivery platform — all pages built, custom JWT auth, Arabic RTL UI
---

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React + Vite (port 5000), Tailwind CSS, RTL Arabic
- Backend: Hono.js (port 8787), Supabase PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM
- Auth: Custom JWT (PBKDF2 password hashing, no Clerk)
- CSS utility classes: `.card`, `.btn-primary`, `.btn-secondary`, `.input`, `.input-field`

## Auth System
- POST /api/auth/register — phone + password + role (CLIENT/COURIER) + address
- POST /api/auth/login — phone + password → JWT
- JWT stored in localStorage as `mandoubak_token`, user as `mandoubak_user`
- JWT_SECRET defaults to 'mandoubak-jwt-secret-2024' if env not set

## Order Types (discriminated union)
- SHOPPING: up to 4 shops, priced by num_shops (base_fee + (shops-1) × price_per_shop)
- DELIVERY: pickup/delivery addresses + phones, priced by distance (Haversine × price_per_km)

## Admin Access
- URL: /admin-secret (guarded by AdminGuard — must have role=admin)
- Hidden entry: 6 clicks on the مندوبك logo → AdminLoginModal
- Credentials: username="sallam", password="255009" (frontend-only check)
- 4 failed attempts → 30min lockout + POST /api/security/alert to backend
- Admin layout has sidebar nav: Dashboard, Orders, Couriers, Clients, Pricing, Ads

## Courier Flow
1. Register via /login (register-courier mode) → creates user with COURIER role
2. Navigate to /courier/register to upload ID card images (front + back)
3. Admin reviews via /admin-secret/couriers → approve/reject/suspend
4. Only APPROVED couriers can see pending orders and accept them

## Key Files
- `backend/src/routes/auth.ts` — registration + login
- `backend/src/lib/jwt-utils.ts` — PBKDF2 hash + HS256 JWT (Web Crypto API, no deps)
- `backend/src/middleware/auth.ts` — JWT verification middleware
- `backend/src/routes/orders.ts` — SHOPPING/DELIVERY order creation + accept
- `backend/src/routes/admin.ts` — full admin CRUD (couriers, clients, orders, pricing, ads)
- `frontend/src/lib/auth-context.tsx` — token + user state, localStorage persistence
- `frontend/src/pages/auth/Login.tsx` — 4 modes: welcome/login/register-client/register-courier
- `frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx` — 6-click logo trick, no admin link in nav
- `frontend/src/App.tsx` — /admin-secret guarded routes + AdminLayout

## No Demo Data
- All demo/fake orders removed from CourierDashboard
- Admin pages use real API calls only
- Courier Dashboard auto-refreshes every 15s from real API

    95→**Why ws package:** Node.js 20 lacks native WebSocket
    96→**Why VITE_ env vars not secrets:** Vite build system only exposes VITE_-prefixed vars to frontend

---
name: Mandoubak project state
description: Complete delivery platform — custom JWT auth, real data, Arabic RTL UI, admin hidden page
---

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React + Vite (port 5000), Tailwind CSS, RTL Arabic
- Backend: Hono.js (port 8787), Supabase PostgreSQL
- Auth: Custom JWT (PBKDF2 password hashing via Web Crypto API, no Clerk)
- CSS utility classes: `.card`, `.btn-primary`, `.btn-secondary`, `.input`, `.input-field`

## Auth System (NO CLERK)
- POST /api/auth/register — phone + password + role (CLIENT/COURIER) + address
- POST /api/auth/login — phone + password → JWT
- JWT stored in localStorage as `mandoubak_token`, user as `mandoubak_user`
- JWT_SECRET defaults to 'mandoubak-jwt-secret-2024' if env not set
- backend/src/lib/jwt-utils.ts — PBKDF2 hash + HS256 JWT (Web Crypto API, zero deps)

## Order Types (discriminated union in Zod)
- SHOPPING: up to 4 shops max, priced by num_shops (base_fee + (shops-1) × price_per_shop)
- DELIVERY: pickup/delivery addresses + phones, priced by distance (Haversine × price_per_km)

## Admin Access (HIDDEN)
- URL: /admin-secret (AdminGuard component — must have role=admin in token)
- Hidden entry: 6 clicks on the مندوبك logo → AdminLoginModal pops up
- Credentials: username="sallam", password="255009" (frontend-only check in Layout.tsx)
- 4 failed attempts → 30min localStorage lockout + POST /api/security/alert
- Admin layout has nav tabs: Dashboard, Orders, Couriers, Clients, Pricing, Ads
- /admin and /admin/* redirect to / (old paths hidden)

## Courier Flow
1. Register via /login (register-courier mode) → creates user + courier record (PENDING_REVIEW)
2. Navigate to /courier/register → upload ID card images (front + back via /api/upload)
3. Admin reviews via /admin-secret/couriers → approve/reject/suspend
4. Only APPROVED couriers see pending orders; 403 with courierStatus returned otherwise

## Key Frontend Files
- `frontend/src/lib/auth-context.tsx` — token + user state, localStorage persistence
- `frontend/src/pages/auth/Login.tsx` — 4 modes: welcome/login/register-client/register-courier
- `frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx` — 6-click logo trick, AdminLoginModal, no admin link in nav
- `frontend/src/App.tsx` — /admin-secret guarded routes + AdminLayout component
- `frontend/src/pages/OrderPage.tsx` — SHOPPING (ShopCard × 4) + DELIVERY (A→B with phones)
- `frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx` — real API stats
- `frontend/src/pages/admin/Couriers.tsx` — real approve/reject/suspend
- `frontend/src/pages/admin/Clients.tsx` — real client list with active status
- `frontend/src/pages/admin/Orders.tsx` — real orders with pagination + filters
- `frontend/src/pages/courier/Dashboard.tsx` — real API, NO demo data, 15s auto-refresh
- `frontend/src/pages/courier/Register.tsx` — ID upload then review step

## Key Backend Files
- `backend/src/routes/auth.ts` — /api/auth/register + /api/auth/login
- `backend/src/routes/orders.ts` — SHOPPING/DELIVERY creation + /pending + /accept
- `backend/src/routes/admin.ts` — couriers, clients, orders, security-alerts, pricing, ads
- `backend/src/middleware/auth.ts` — JWT verification + requireRole helper

## No Demo Data
- All demo/fake orders removed from CourierDashboard (was DEMO_PENDING array)
- All admin pages use real API calls
- Courier Dashboard auto-refreshes every 15s from /api/orders/pending

## DB Schema additions (sql/password-auth-migration.sql)
- users: password_hash, address, last_seen_at
- orders: recipient_phone, num_shops
- admin_pricing: price_per_shop, base_fee_shopping
- security_alerts table: type, ip_address, user_agent, details, is_read

## Why custom JWT instead of Clerk
- Simpler for phone+password auth without Clerk phone verification setup
- PBKDF2 is secure, no external JWT library needed (Web Crypto API)

     9→export async function hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {

    11→  const keyMaterial = await crypto.subtle.importKey(

    22→  )
    23→  const toHex = (buf: Uint8Array) =>
    24→    Array.from(buf).map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('')
    25→  return `${toHex(salt)}:${toHex(new Uint8Array(bits))}`
    26→}

    28→export async function verifyPassword(password: string, stored: string): Promise<boolean> {
    29→  try {
    30→    const [saltHex, storedHash] = stored.split(':')
    31→    if (!saltHex || !storedHash) return false
    32→    const salt = new Uint8Array(saltHex.match(/.{2}/g)!.map(b => parseInt(b, 16)))
    33→    const keyMaterial = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
    34→      'raw',
    35→      new TextEncoder().encode(password),
    36→      'PBKDF2',
    37→      false,
    38→      ['deriveBits']
    39→    )
    40→    const bits = await crypto.subtle.deriveBits(
    41→      { name: 'PBKDF2', salt, iterations: 100000, hash: 'SHA-256' },
    42→      keyMaterial,
    43→      256
    44→    )
    45→    const hashHex = Array.from(new Uint8Array(bits))
    46→      .map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('')
    47→    return hashHex === storedHash
    48→  } catch {
    49→    return false
    50→  }
    51→}

    55→// =====================
    56→
    57→function b64url(obj: object): string {
    58→  return btoa(JSON.stringify(obj))
    59→    .replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=/g, '')
    60→}
    61→
    62→function decodeB64url(str: string): string {
    63→  const padded = str.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/') +
    64→    '=='.slice(0, (4 - str.length % 4) % 4)
    65→  return atob(padded)
    66→}

    68→export async function signJWT(
    69→  payload: Record<string, unknown>,
    70→  secret: string,
    71→  expiresInSecs = 86400 * 30  // 30 days
    72→): Promise<string> {
    73→  const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)
    74→  const fullPayload = { ...payload, iat: now, exp: now + expiresInSecs }
    75→
    76→  const headerB64 = b64url({ alg: 'HS256', typ: 'JWT' })
    77→  const payloadB64 = b64url(fullPayload)
    78→  const signing = `${headerB64}.${payloadB64}`
    79→

    81→    'raw',
    82→    new TextEncoder().encode(secret),
    83→    { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' },

    85→    ['sign']
    86→  )

    89→  )
    90→  const sigB64 = btoa(String.fromCharCode(...new Uint8Array(sigBytes)))
    91→    .replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=/g, '')
    92→
    93→  return `${signing}.${sigB64}`
    94→}

    97→  token: string,
    98→  secret: string
    99→): Promise<Record<string, unknown> | null> {
   100→  try {
   101→    const parts = token.split('.')
   102→    if (parts.length !== 3) return null
   103→
   104→    const [headerB64, payloadB64, sigB64] = parts
   105→    const signing = `${headerB64}.${payloadB64}`
   106→
   107→    const key = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
   108→      'raw',
   109→      new TextEncoder().encode(secret),
   110→      { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' },
   111→      false,
   112→      ['verify']
   113→    )
   114→    const sigBytes = Uint8Array.from(
   115→      decodeB64url(sigB64),
   116→      c => c.charCodeAt(0)
   117→    )
   118→    const valid = await crypto.subtle.verify(
   119→      'HMAC', key, sigBytes, new TextEncoder().encode(signing)
   120→    )
   121→    if (!valid) return null
   122→
   123→    const payload = JSON.parse(decodeB64url(payloadB64))
   124→    if (payload.exp && payload.exp < Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)) return null
   125→
   126→    return payload
   127→  } catch {
   128→    return null
   129→  }
